name: Marina Lara Fukushima
bio: Marina Lara Fukushima is a Brazilian survivalist and rural producer based at her property Sítio Trópico de Capricórnio, where she focuses on bio-construction and sustainable living. A former civil engineer with 11 years of experience, she pivoted careers to embrace a wilderness lifestyle. She was a cast member on the Brazilian edition of the franchise ({{series:Naked and Afraid Brasil}} / Largados e Pelados Brasil) before representing Brazil on {{series:Naked and Afraid: Global Showdown}} alongside Rene Murad.

name: Pablo Melin Dorador
bio: Pablo Melin Dorador is a Mexican survivalist with degrees in Environmental Management Engineering and a Master's in Applied Geomatics for Forest and Environmental Resources. His professional background spans environmental health and safety, consulting and auditing, and he is associated with Locos de la Montaña, organizing trekking and mountain outings. He appeared on the Latin American edition ({{series:Supervivencia al Desnudo}}) and represents Mexico on {{series:Naked and Afraid: Global Showdown}} paired with Fernanda Perez.

name: Rene Murad
bio: Rene Murad is a professional survivalist, naturalist, and motivational speaker from São Paulo, Brazil, who teaches what he calls the five pillars of survival and draws on Indigenous wilderness traditions. He also works as an environmental manager, exotic fauna handler, and tattoo artist, and runs an online store selling curated bushcraft and hunting gear. He was the first Brazilian to appear on the Brazilian edition of the franchise ({{series:Naked and Afraid Brasil}} / Largados e Pelados) and represents Brazil on {{series:Naked and Afraid: Global Showdown}} alongside Marina Fukushima.
